name: TakeCareOS
long_description: TakeCareOS is building the infrastructure for the AI-native home care agency. Today’s care providers are held back by massive administrative overhead, buried under fragmented tools and manual workflows. TakeCareOS consolidates the entire care lifecycle—scheduling, billing, incident management, compliance, customer support etc.—into a single, intelligent system driven by AI agents. We are eliminating the operational friction of care coordination to establish a new standard of high-efficiency, highly scalable home care.
